steps.title: Identify the supplementary angles
steps.content: When a transversal cuts two parallel lines, the co-interior (same-side) angles are supplementary — they sum to $180°$.

steps.title: Calculate x
steps.content:
From the figure, $x$ and the marked $28°$ angle are co-interior angles, so:
$$x + 28° = 180°$$
$$x = 180° - 28° = 152°$$
The answer is 152.
